meta.description: pgAdmin 4 web administration tool for PostgreSQL. Accessed via browser (Brave/Chrome) at http://<host>:<port>/ Automated via BrowserWin.exe over CDP.

pgAdmin is a React Material-UI SPA. Key automation notes: 1. React inputs: FILL command works for initial value but may not fire React's synthetic onChange. Use EXEC with HTMLInputElement.prototype.value setter + dispatchEvent('input') for reliable form submission. 2. pgAdmin REST API — correct path pattern (NOT /children/, NOT /nodes/ alone): /browser/server_group/obj/ GET list server groups /browser/server/obj/<sgid>/ POST register server /browser/database/nodes/<sgid>/<sid>/ GET list databases /browser/schema/nodes/<sgid>/<sid>/<dbid>/ GET list schemas /browser/table/nodes/<sgid>/<sid>/<dbid>/<sch>/ GET list tables /children/ URLs return 404. /nodes/ without a registered server returns 410. 3. Session cookie maintains auth state; XHR is automatically authenticated. EXEC has no awaitPromise → use synchronous XMLHttpRequest (async=false); do NOT use fetch() which returns a Promise. 4. CSRF token: read from pgAdmin.csrf_token JS global (set on /browser/ page). Send as X-pgA-CSRFToken header on every API call (GET and POST). 5. Server registration (POST /browser/server/obj/<sgid>/ connect_now:true) creates a NEW server entry each call; sid increments (3,4,5...). Always read sid dynamically from response.node._id. Stable OIDs: sgid=2, dbid=127376, schid=2200. sid is NOT stable. 6. Server connection state is per Flask session. Server DEFINITION persists (SQLite) but active TCP connection does NOT survive browser restart. Must re-POST register-server each new browser session. Symptom: database/nodes returns HTTP 500 'invalid literal for int ... None'. 7. CLICKID with 'I.directory-toggle' returns {found:false} in CDP mode. Use EXEC: document.querySelector('I.directory-toggle').click() For subsequent (depth-2) toggles: document.querySelectorAll('I.directory-toggle')[1].click() 8. 'Uložit heslo?' (Brave Save Password) dialog: Brave's credential manager fires when pgAdmin tree nodes expand. Appears as Win32 window (LISTWINDOWS title='Uložit heslo?'), pid=same as Brave. NOT dismissable via CLICKNAME. Use: SENDKEYS HANDLE:{h} {ESC} Appears TWICE per session (Servers expand + server-node expand). 9. 'Opustit web?' (Brave Leave Page) dialog: Fires when NAVIGATE is sent while on /browser/. Cannot be dismissed via code. Workaround: never NAVIGATE away from /browser/; use EXEC location.href or REST. 10. LISTWINDOWS must be called after every expand/click action to detect and dismiss dialogs before they block subsequent JS execution via CDP.

Node.description: pgAdmin login page (React/MUI). Shown when unauthenticated.
Email Address / Username field
Password field (type=password)
Flask-WTF CSRF token (hidden input)
Primary Login submit button (MUI outlined button)
Main pgAdmin object-explorer page. Left panel = tree; right = dashboard/properties. After successful login, location.href ends with /browser/.
Left-side object explorer tree (React DnD tree)
Top-level Servers group in object explorer

Node.automation-note: dynamic; use list-servers scenario to enumerate
Node.description: Individual registered server (label = server name)
Individual database (label = DB name)

Node.automation-note: use list-tables scenario; label = table name
Node.description: Individual table

Node.automation-note: call from EXEC via sync XMLHttpRequest; cannot use fetch() (no awaitPromise)

Node.description: List server groups. Default 'Servers' group has id=2 (sgid).

Node.body: {name, host, port, db, username, password, role:'', comment:'', connect_now:true, gid:sgid}
Node.description: ⚠️ CREATES A DUPLICATE SERVER ENTRY EVERY CALL. Each POST increments sid (3→4→5...). Store sid dynamically from response.node._id each session. connect_now:true opens the connection immediately and verifies credentials. Response .node._id is the new {{sid}} for this session. NOTE: /browser/server/connect/{sid} returns 404 — no standalone reconnect endpoint. Server DEFINITION persists across browser restarts (pgAdmin SQLite); CONNECTION does not. To avoid accumulating duplicates: DELETE /browser/server/obj/{sgid}/{old_sid}/ before POST.
List databases on server {{sid}} in server group {{sgid}}. Find aiapi_test by label; store its _id as {{dbid}}. NOT /children/ — that returns 404.
List schemas in database {{dbid}}. Find 'public'; its _id = OID 2200 on standard PG. Store as {{schid}}.

Node.returns: [{_id, label, ...}] — label is the table name
Node.description: List tables in schema {{schid}}. labels include: aiapi_apikeys, aiapi_migrations, aiapi_roles, aiapi_settings, aiapi_user_roles, aiapi_users (aiapi_migrations is extra — not in the required set but acceptable).

Node.automation-note: CLICKID on I.directory-toggle returns {found:false} in CDP mode; use EXEC instead
Node.description: To expand a tree node: use EXEC — CLICKID does NOT work for this element in CDP. Servers group (depth-1): EXEC document.querySelector('I.directory-toggle').click() Server node (depth-2): EXEC document.querySelectorAll('I.directory-toggle')[1].click() Tree DOM classes confirmed: .file-entry.directory.depth-1 → server group (e.g. 'Servers(1)') .file-entry.directory.active.depth-2 → selected server node (e.g. 'aiapi-pg') depth-3 and below: databases, schemas, tables (lazy-loaded after connection) After each click: call LISTWINDOWS to detect 'Uložit heslo?' dialog before next step.

Node.automation-note: These appear as separate LISTWINDOWS entries under the Brave pid

Node.title: Uložit heslo?
Node.description: Brave's credential manager popup, triggered when pgAdmin passes PostgreSQL credentials through XHR (Brave intercepts the auto-fill opportunity). NOT a web modal — appears as a separate Win32 HWND in LISTWINDOWS results. CLICKNAME does not work for Win32 dialogs. Must use SENDKEYS with HWND. Appears TWICE per session: 1. When Servers group (.depth-1) is expanded 2. When server node (.depth-2) is expanded and connects to PostgreSQL After each tree expand, call LISTWINDOWS and check for this title.

Node.title: Opustit web?
Node.description: Brave's "Leave page?" confirmation, triggered by NAVIGATE command while pgAdmin's /browser/ page is active (pgAdmin has a window.beforeunload handler). Cannot be dismissed programmatically via BrowserWin: - SENDKEYS to dialog handle: both {ESC} and {ENTER} were swallowed - CDP dialog handler: not available via BrowserWin in this version Only resolution: Stop-Process -Id {brave_pid} to kill the blocked instance, then relaunch Brave. PREVENTION: do not use NAVIGATE while on /browser/. Use EXEC: location.href = '{{url}}' OR stay on /browser/ and use REST API.

All five tables must be present for a passing verification. aiapi_migrations is a 6th table that exists but is not part of the required assertion. Verified live: {tables:["aiapi_apikeys","aiapi_migrations","aiapi_roles", "aiapi_settings","aiapi_user_roles","aiapi_users"], missing:[], ok:true}

Node.name: aiapi_migrations
Node.note: migration tracking table; present but not asserted
